heading: Periodical binding of printed hearings of committee testimony
label: 145a Periodical binding of printed hearings of committee testimony
text: The Librarian of the Library of Congress is authorized and directed to have bound at the end of each session of Congress the printed hearings of testimony taken by each committee of the Congress at the preceding session.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see section 142 of , .Aug. 2, 1946act Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 753, title I60 Stat. 834
